steps.title: Track the two requirements
steps.content: The student needs to explain whom the A.M. Turing Award is named for and identify one recipient. The notes name Alan Turing as the namesake and Judea Pearl as a 2011 recipient.

steps.title: Reject missing information
steps.content: Choice A gives the award's purpose but not the namesake or recipient. Choice C names a recipient and purpose but not the namesake. Choice D names only a recipient and year.

steps.title: Choose namesake and recipient
steps.content: The sentence that names Alan Turing and Judea Pearl satisfies both parts of the student's goal. The answer is B.
